mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UD_FILE ( FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_PATH, CONTENT_TYPE, FILE_SIZE, UPLOAD_USER, UPLOAD_TIME, BUSINESS_CODE, DESCRIPTION ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{originalName}, #{storedPath}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{uploadUser}, #{uploadTime}, #{businessCode}, #{description} )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID AS "fileId", ORIGINAL_NAME AS "originalName", STORED_PATH AS "storedPath", CONTENT_TYPE AS "contentType", FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", UPLOAD_USER AS "uploadUser", UPLOAD_TIME AS "uploadTime", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", DESCRIPTION AS "description" FROM UD_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
mapper.sql: FILE_ID AS "fileId", ORIGINAL_NAME AS "originalName", CONTENT_TYPE AS "contentType", FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", UPLOAD_USER AS "uploadUser", UPLOAD_TIME AS "uploadTime", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", DESCRIPTION AS "description"
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM UD_FILE
ORDER BY UPLOAD_TIME DESC

SELECT FROM UD_FILE
ORDER BY UPLOAD_TIME DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
